title: CDS Unit Testing with Test Double Framework — Isolated
description: CDS Unit Testing with Test Double Framework — Isolated. Key topics: CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=>CREATE() creates a test double. GET_DOUBLE()->INSERT() injects test data into the double tables. Wrap tests in an ABAP Unit class (CLASS ... FOR TESTING) with.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=>CREATE() creates a test double
◆GET_DOUBLE()->INSERT() injects test data into the double tables
◆Wrap tests in an ABAP Unit class (CLASS ... FOR TESTING) with
◆DISABLE_DCL (via CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=>GET_DCL()) bypasses
◆Test WHERE clause filtering, CASE and COALESCE expressions, and
◆Integrate with ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit) — CDS unit tests are
◆CI/CD pipeline integration: execute via RUN_ATC or CL_ATC_API.

sections.title: CDS Source Code
sections.codeBlock:
CLASS zcl_cds_test_travel_demo DEFINITION FOR TESTING
  DURATION SHORT
  RISK LEVEL HARMLESS.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA:
      mv_cut_name    TYPE string,
      mo_test_env    TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_environment,
      mo_travel_dbl  TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_data,
      mo_booking_dbl TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_data.

    METHODS:
      setup,
      teardown,
      " --- Test Cases ---
      filter_by_status         FOR TESTING,
      calculated_price_field   FOR TESTING,
      case_when_category       FOR TESTING,
      null_handling_coalesce   FOR TESTING.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_cds_test_travel_demo IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD setup.
    " 1. Create test environment for the CDS view under test
    mo_test_env = cl_cds_test_environment=>create(
                    i_for_entity = 'ZPRAC_TRAVEL_OPTIMIZED' ).

    " 2. Disable DCL so authorization checks don't pollute results
    mo_test_env->get_dcl( )->disable_dcl( ).

    " 3. Obtain data doubles for underlying tables
    mo_travel_dbl  = mo_test_env->get_double( i_name = '/DMO/TRAVEL' ).
    mo_booking_dbl = mo_test_env->get_double( i_name = '/DMO/BOOKING' ).

    " 4. Insert test data (2 travel records with different statuses)
    mo_travel_dbl->insert( VALUE #(
      ( travel_id  = '00000001'
        agency_id  = '000001'
        customer_id = '000001'
        total_price = '1000.00'
        currency_code = 'USD'
        status     = 'A'           " Accepted
        created_by = 'TESTUSER'
        created_at = '20250101000000' )
      ( travel_id  = '00000002'
        agency_id  = '000002'
        customer_id = '000002'
        total_price = '2500.00'
        currency_code = 'EUR'
        status     = 'B'           " Booked
        created_by = 'TESTUSER'
        created_at = '20250101000000' )
    ) ).

    " 5. Insert booking data for association tests
    mo_booking_dbl->insert( VALUE #(
      ( booking_id   = '00000001'
        travel_id    = '00000001'
        booking_status = 'N' )
    ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD teardown.
    mo_test_env->destroy( ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD filter_by_status.
    " --- Test: WHERE clause filters on status = 'A' ---
    SELECT *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'A',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      exp = 1
      act = lines( lt_result )
      msg = 'Filter for status A should return exactly 1 row' ).

    READ TABLE lt_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>) INDEX 1.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      exp = '00000001'
      act = <fs>-travel_id
      msg = 'Travel ID of status A row' ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD calculated_price_field.
    " --- Test: Price value is projected correctly ---
    SELECT *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'B',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial(
      act = lt_result
      msg = 'Result should be non-empty for status B' ).

    READ TABLE lt_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>) INDEX 1.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      exp = '2500.00'
      act = <fs>-total_price
      msg = 'Total price should match injected value' ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD case_when_category.
    " --- Test: CASE expression categorizes data ---
    " This assumes a CASE expression exists in the view
    " that categorizes e.g. price as 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'
    SELECT *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'A',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

    " Example assertion — adapt to your actual CASE field name
    LOOP AT lt_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).
      " cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_char_cp(
      "   exp = 'MEDIUM*'
      "   act = <fs>-price_category ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD null_handling_coalesce.
    " --- Test: COALESCE replaces initial currency_code ---
    " Insert a record with initial currency to verify COALESCE
    mo_travel_dbl->insert( VALUE #(
      ( travel_id    = '00000003'
        agency_id    = '000003'
        customer_id  = '000003'
        total_price  = '500.00'
        currency_code = ''
        status       = 'A'
        created_by   = 'TESTUSER'
        created_at   = '20250101000000' )
    ) ).

    SELECT singLE *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'A',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      WHERE travel_id = '00000003'
      INTO @DATA(ls_result).

    " If the view uses COALESCE( currency_code, 'USD' ), assert fallback
    " cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
    "   exp = 'USD'
    "   act = ls_result-currency_code ).
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

/*
 * ====================================================================
 * CI/CD INTEGRATION (Pseudo-configuration)
 * ====================================================================
 *
 *  Jenkins / GitHub Actions step:
 *    RUN_ATC  (or  CL_ATC_API=>RUN_ATC  via ABAP)
 *      --package  = $ZPRAC_CDS_PACKAGE
 *      --check    = CDS_UNIT_TEST
 *      --severity = ERROR
 *
 *  The ATC variant ZPRAC_CDS_TEST_VARIANT activates the unit-test
 *  checks for the test class category CLAS_UT (ABAP Unit).
 *
 *  Pipeline gates:
 *    - FAIL if any CDS unit test returns ERROR or FATAL
 *    - WARN on WARNING severity findings
 *
 * ====================================================================
 */

content:
Key Learning Points

◆CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=>CREATE() creates a test double
◆GET_DOUBLE()->INSERT() injects test data into the double tables
◆Wrap tests in an ABAP Unit class (CLASS ... FOR TESTING) with
◆DISABLE_DCL (via CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=>GET_DCL()) bypasses
◆Test WHERE clause filtering, CASE and COALESCE expressions, and
◆Integrate with ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit) — CDS unit tests are
◆CI/CD pipeline integration: execute via RUN_ATC or CL_ATC_API.

CDS Source Code

CLASS zcl_cds_test_travel_demo DEFINITION FOR TESTING
  DURATION SHORT
  RISK LEVEL HARMLESS.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA:
      mv_cut_name    TYPE string,
      mo_test_env    TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_environment,
      mo_travel_dbl  TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_data,
      mo_booking_dbl TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_data.

    METHODS:
      setup,
      teardown,
      " --- Test Cases ---
      filter_by_status         FOR TESTING,
      calculated_price_field   FOR TESTING,
      case_when_category       FOR TESTING,
      null_handling_coalesce   FOR TESTING.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_cds_test_travel_demo IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD setup.
    " 1. Create test environment for the CDS view under test
    mo_test_env = cl_cds_test_environment=>create(
                    i_for_entity = 'ZPRAC_TRAVEL_OPTIMIZED' ).

    " 2. Disable DCL so authorization checks don't pollute results
    mo_test_env->get_dcl( )->disable_dcl( ).

    " 3. Obtain data doubles for underlying tables
    mo_travel_dbl  = mo_test_env->get_double( i_name = '/DMO/TRAVEL' ).
    mo_booking_dbl = mo_test_env->get_double( i_name = '/DMO/BOOKING' ).

    " 4. Insert test data (2 travel records with different statuses)
    mo_travel_dbl->insert( VALUE #(
      ( travel_id  = '00000001'
        agency_id  = '000001'
        customer_id = '000001'
        total_price = '1000.00'
        currency_code = 'USD'
        status     = 'A'           " Accepted
        created_by = 'TESTUSER'
        created_at = '20250101000000' )
      ( travel_id  = '00000002'
        agency_id  = '000002'
        customer_id = '000002'
        total_price = '2500.00'
        currency_code = 'EUR'
        status     = 'B'           " Booked
        created_by = 'TESTUSER'
        created_at = '20250101000000' )
    ) ).

    " 5. Insert booking data for association tests
    mo_booking_dbl->insert( VALUE #(
      ( booking_id   = '00000001'
        travel_id    = '00000001'
        booking_status = 'N' )
    ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD teardown.
    mo_test_env->destroy( ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD filter_by_status.
    " --- Test: WHERE clause filters on status = 'A' ---
    SELECT *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'A',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      exp = 1
      act = lines( lt_result )
      msg = 'Filter for status A should return exactly 1 row' ).

    READ TABLE lt_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL() INDEX 1.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      exp = '00000001'
      act = -travel_id
      msg = 'Travel ID of status A row' ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD calculated_price_field.
    " --- Test: Price value is projected correctly ---
    SELECT *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'B',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial(
      act = lt_result
      msg = 'Result should be non-empty for status B' ).

    READ TABLE lt_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL() INDEX 1.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      exp = '2500.00'
      act = -total_price
      msg = 'Total price should match injected value' ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD case_when_category.
    " --- Test: CASE expression categorizes data ---
    " This assumes a CASE expression exists in the view
    " that categorizes e.g. price as 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'
    SELECT *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'A',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

    " Example assertion — adapt to your actual CASE field name
    LOOP AT lt_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL().
      " cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_char_cp(
      "   exp = 'MEDIUM*'
      "   act = -price_category ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD null_handling_coalesce.
    " --- Test: COALESCE replaces initial currency_code ---
    " Insert a record with initial currency to verify COALESCE
    mo_travel_dbl->insert( VALUE #(
      ( travel_id    = '00000003'
        agency_id    = '000003'
        customer_id  = '000003'
        total_price  = '500.00'
        currency_code = ''
        status       = 'A'
        created_by   = 'TESTUSER'
        created_at   = '20250101000000' )
    ) ).

    SELECT singLE *
      FROM zprc_travel_optimized(
             p_mandt     = sy-mandt,
             p_status    = 'A',
             p_min_price = '0' )
      WHERE travel_id = '00000003'
      INTO @DATA(ls_result).

    " If the view uses COALESCE( currency_code, 'USD' ), assert fallback
    " cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
    "   exp = 'USD'
    "   act = ls_result-currency_code ).
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

/*
 * ====================================================================
 * CI/CD INTEGRATION (Pseudo-configuration)
 * ====================================================================
 *
 *  Jenkins / GitHub Actions step:
 *    RUN_ATC  (or  CL_ATC_API=>RUN_ATC  via ABAP)
 *      --package  = $ZPRAC_CDS_PACKAGE
 *      --check    = CDS_UNIT_TEST
 *      --severity = ERROR
 *
 *  The ATC variant ZPRAC_CDS_TEST_VARIANT activates the unit-test
 *  checks for the test class category CLAS_UT (ABAP Unit).
 *
 *  Pipeline gates:
 *    - FAIL if any CDS unit test returns ERROR or FATAL
 *    - WARN on WARNING severity findings
 *
 * ====================================================================
 */
details:
environment that replaces the underlying dictionary tables of a

CDS view with in-memory test data — no real database access.

before the CDS SELECT executes. Data lifetime is scoped to the

test method / class.

SETUP and TEARDOWN methods. TEARDOWN must call DESTROY() to

release the environment.

DCL / DCLX (access control) during tests — crucial for

isolating view logic from authorization rules.

calculated fields. These contain business logic prone to error.

discovered and executed automatically when configured in the

test class as FOR TESTING.

Gate the build on CDS test results.

TIPS — WHAT TO TEST:

✓ Calculated fields (CASE, COALESCE, aggregation)

✓ WHERE clause correctness (boundary values, NULL handling)

✓ Associations that project fields into the result

✓ Currency/unit conversion logic

✓ @Consumption annotations that affect client behavior

TIPS — WHAT NOT TO TEST:

✗ Simple 1:1 projections from a single table (pure pass-through)

✗ Pure annotation changes (annotations do not alter result rows)

✗ Database-internal optimizations (compareFilter, merge behavior)

✗ DCL / authorization (test those via SAML / authorization unit tests)

ABAP UNIT TEST CLASS — CDS VIEW TEST DOUBLE
topic: Automated testing of CDS views using CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT
